headline: AI in Cybersecurity: Threat Detection and LLM-Powered Defense
description: AI is reshaping cybersecurity: machine learning detects anomalies in network traffic, LLMs automate threat intelligence analysis and vulnerability detection, and generative AI enables real-time incident response — creating an arms race between AI-powered defense and AI-powered attacks.

citation.name: When LLMs meet cybersecurity: a systematic literature review
AI-driven cybersecurity framework for anomaly detection and threat classification
